scripts.dev: npm run db:start && npm run db:migrate:local && npm run build:workers --workspace=web && npm run preview:workers --workspace=web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=web && npm run typecheck --workspace=send-email && npm run typecheck --workspace=e2e
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:integration: npm run db:reset && npm run db:migrate:local && npm run test:e2e && npm run db:stop
